title: Brij Garden Vrindavan Jait
shortDescription: MVDA-approved gated society plots in Vrindavan. Sizes 80–500 sq.yd at ₹35,000/sq.yd. Prime location with all amenities.
description:
Brij Garden Vrindavan Jait is a premium gated residential plot community in the sacred city of Vrindavan. Located in Jait, this thoughtfully planned society offers plots ranging from 80 to 500 sq.yd, making it ideal for families looking to build their dream home in a serene and spiritual setting.

The project is approved by MVDA (Mathura-Vrindavan Development Authority) at ₹45,000 per sq.yd and available at a special launch price of ₹35,000 per sq.yd with full payment within a month. The society features a secure gated entrance, dedicated parking, and assured water and power supply — everything you need for comfortable living.

Vrindavan is one of India's most sought-after residential destinations, blending spiritual heritage with modern infrastructure. This is a rare opportunity to own land in this holy city at an exceptional price.

title: Braj Dham Vrindavan

specs.configuration: 3BHK + Premium Lounge + Modular Kitchen + Desi Chulha + Open Lawn

shortDescription: Fully furnished luxury duplex bamboo cottage in Vrindavan. MVDA NOC approved, 200 sq.yd, assured rental income ₹35,000/month for 36 months.
description:
Braj Dham Vrindavan is an exclusive gated community offering fully furnished luxury duplex bamboo cottages in the sacred city of Vrindavan. Each cottage sits on a 200 sq.yd (1800 sq.ft) residential plot with 30 ft. road access, offering a rare combination of spirituality, comfort, and investment value.

Every cottage is designed as a spacious 3 BHK duplex with a premium lounge, 4 washrooms, a modular kitchen, a traditional desi chulha, and a beautiful open lawn. The project holds MVDA NOC approval under Sec 80 C, ensuring complete legal peace of mind.

As an investor, you receive assured rental income of ₹35,000 per month for 36 months, 90 complimentary night stays, 25% discount at Braj Dham Restaurant, and free pick & drop for Vrindavan temple visits. The community features 24×7 sankirtan, a meditation facility, Shri Braj Bihari Ji Temple, and 5 KW solar power in every villa — making it a truly divine investment.
highlights: 30 Ft. Wide Road | MVDA NOC Approved

title: Ananda Majestic – Luxury Studios Near Prem Mandir

location.address: VIP Sunrak Road, Near Prem Mandir

shortDescription: Pre-launch luxury studio apartments in a 35-acre gated high-rise community near Prem Mandir, Vrindavan. MVDA & RERA approved. Under ₹8,000/sq.ft.
description:
Ananda Majestic is a grand 35-acre secure gated community designed by the renowned ACPL Architects, offering premium high-rise living in the heart of Vrindavan — right near the iconic Prem Mandir. This G+22 floor tower redefines luxury living in a spiritual setting.

The project features The Grand Arcade Resort & Spa — a 5-star hotel within the campus — along with premium studio apartments, 1 BHK, and 2 BHK configurations. The pre-launch price is under ₹8,000/sq.ft (launch price: ₹9,990/sq.ft), with a Construction Linked Payment Plan (CLP) for easy financing. EOI booking starts at just ₹2 Lakhs.

Ananda Majestic is both MVDA and RERA approved, offering full legal clarity and peace of mind. The location is unmatched — just 5 mins from Prem Mandir, 6 mins from ISKCON Temple, 10 mins from Banke Bihari Mandir, and 5 mins from NH-2. Whether you seek a spiritual retreat, a luxury holiday home, or a high-appreciation investment, this is Vrindavan's most exciting new address.
highlights: 5-Star Grand Arcade Resort & Spa on campus

title: Hare Krishna Ashiyana – Ultra-Premium 3 BHK

location.address: GH-3, Rukmani Vihar Phase-1, Near ISKCON Temple

specs.developer: Hare Krishna Homes (Epoch Realtech Pvt. Ltd)

shortDescription: Ultra-premium fully air-conditioned 3 BHK apartments by Hare Krishna Homes in Rukmani Vihar, Vrindavan. 1925 sq.ft | ₹2.11 Cr | 2 min from ISKCON Temple & Prem Mandir. RERA Approved.
description:
Hare Krishna Ashiyana by Hare Krishna Homes (Epoch Realtech Pvt. Ltd) is a signature ultra-premium residential development at GH-3, Rukmani Vihar Phase-1 — one of the most prestigious addresses in Mathura-Vrindavan. The project offers spacious 3 BHK apartments of 1925 sq.ft with grand entry from a 100 ft wide boulevard.

Each home is 4-side open with 10 ft ceiling height, fully air-conditioned with split AC in all rooms and drawing rooms, ensuring exceptional comfort, natural light, and ventilation. Every apartment is equipped with full smart home automation — control your security, lighting, and appliances from anywhere, anytime. The 2-tower G+14 floor structure is designed by a top-renowned architect, offering sweeping views of the holy city.

The project is RERA approved (UPRERAPRJ424528/11/2024) and offers world-class amenities including an indoor luxury swimming pool, badminton court, premium gym, kids play area, cricket pitch, terrace garden with seating, sky garden, yoga & meditation centre, health club, walking trail, and more.

The location is unmatched — just 2 minutes from both ISKCON Temple and Prem Mandir, directly opposite Vrindavan's largest shopping mall (Omaxe Commercial), and within 500 metres of iconic 5-star and 7-star hotels including Taj, Radisson Blu, Best Western, and Nidhivan Sarovar Portico. Hare Krishna Ashiyana is truly the best smart property that Vrindavan has to offer.
amenities: Fully Air-Conditioned (Split AC in All Rooms)
High Speed Elevators with Power Backup
highlights: ISKCON Temple – 2 Min | Prem Mandir – 2 Min
Booking Amount: ₹10 Lakh | CLP Payment Plan

title: Mero Vrindavan Dham – Residential & Commercial Plots
shortDescription: New registry with mutation plots by Subh Sankalp Estate Pvt. Ltd. in a prime township on Yamuna Expressway, nearest Vrindavan. Sizes 60–300 sq.yd. 10–15 min from Mathura-Vrindavan.
description:
Mero Vrindavan Dham is a brand-new township project by Subh Sankalp Estate Pvt. Ltd., featuring residential and commercial plots with new registry and mutation. Strategically located right on the Yamuna Expressway — the nearest township to Vrindavan — it offers seamless connectivity to all major spiritual and commercial destinations.

Plot sizes range from 60 to 300 sq.yd, making it accessible for a wide range of buyers. The location is exceptional: just 10–15 minutes from Mathura-Vrindavan, 12–15 minutes from Banke Bihari Temple and Prem Mandir, 20–25 minutes from Krishna Janmbhumi, 5–7 minutes from Raya Heritage City, 40–45 minutes from Noida International Airport, and 40–45 minutes from the Industrial Hub.

Whether you are looking to build your spiritual retreat, a commercial venture, or a long-term real estate investment, Mero Vrindavan Dham offers an unmatched combination of location, legal clarity, and value.
amenities: 12–15 Min from Banke Bihari Temple & Prem Mandir
highlights: New Registry with Mutation – Full Legal Clarity
Yamuna Expressway | Nearest Township to Vrindavan

title: Alpha Sky Villa – Premium 2 & 3 BHK Apartments

location.address: Inside Hare Krishna Orchid Boundary, Near Prem Mandir & Keli Kunj

shortDescription: MVDA & RERA approved fully furnished centralized AC apartments at ₹11,000/sq.ft inside Hare Krishna Orchid Boundary, Vrindavan. 2 BHK (1319 sq.ft) & 3 BHK (1922 sq.ft). Book at ₹2 Lakh token. 90% bank loan available.
description:
Alpha Sky Villa is a premium residential project located inside the prestigious Hare Krishna Orchid Boundary in Vrindavan — one of the most sought-after addresses in the holy city. The project offers fully furnished, centralized air-conditioned apartments in 2 BHK and 3 BHK configurations at ₹11,000 per sq.ft.

**3 BHK Configuration:** 3 Bedrooms + 1 Living Room + 1 Kitchen + 3 Toilets + 1 Lobby + 3 Balconies | Carpet Area: 1163 sq.ft | Built-up Area: 1475 sq.ft | Super Area: 1922 sq.ft | Price: ₹2.11 Cr

**2 BHK Configuration:** 2 Bedrooms + 1 Living Room + 1 Kitchen + 2 Toilets + 3 Balconies | Carpet Area: 797 sq.ft | Built-up Area: 1012 sq.ft | Super Area: 1319 sq.ft | Price: ₹1.45 Cr

Approved by both MVDA and RERA, with up to 90% bank loan facility. Payment is based on a comfortable Construction Linked Payment (CLP) plan spread over 3 years — 10% at booking and 15% within 30 days of booking.

The project is located close to Prem Mandir, Keli Kunj, and the Sobari Van Theme Park, with excellent proximity to Parikrama Marg and 24×7 transportation connectivity. All daily conveniences including banks, hospitals, police stations, schools, hotels, renowned ashrams, and Vrindavan's famous Chaat Chowpatty are nearby.

Reserve your preferred apartment with a token amount of just ₹2 Lakh.
